title: chorilepis kingii
side_effects: Chorilepis kingii can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and digestive issues. In severe cases, it may cause dizziness, headaches, and nausea due to its toxic properties. Long-term exposure to the plant's extracts can also lead to respiratory problems and interact with certain medications, exacerbating pre-existing health conditions. Improper handling and consumption of chorilepis kingii can have serious health consequences and should be avoided by individuals without proper medical supervision and knowledge.
